---
title: "Meta Documentation - Gone Golfing"
subtitle: "The Full Documentation Statement for Each Phase"
author: "Michael Manolakis"
date: today
date-format: "[Spring] YYYY"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    geometry: margin=1in
---

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 1 Parsing/01 - Phase1_Documentation.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 2 Spatial Polygons and True Acreage/01 - Phase2_Documentation.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 3 Economic Merge and MICE Imputation/01 - Phase3_Documentation.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 4 Econometric Modeling/01 - Phase4_Documentation.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 5 The Hawaii Micro-Case Study/01 - Phase5_Documentation.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 6 Visualization/01 - Phase6_Documentation.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 7 Documentation, Discussion and Write Up/other/Phase7_Documentation.md" >}}
